title: sarcocapnos baetica
intro: Sarcocapnos baetica, also known as Baetic poppy or Spanish poppy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Papaveraceae family. It is native to the Iberian Peninsula and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The plant's health benefits include relieving pain, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Sarcocapnos baetica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
